projectDescription: A modern Python CLI for archiving YouTube playlists with media-server-friendly sidecar files including NFO metadata, thumbnails, and subtitles.
keyFeatures: Download YouTube playlists with yt-dlp, with configurable format and quality
Generate media-server-friendly NFO sidecar files for Jellyfin/Emby/Kodi
Automatic thumbnail and subtitle sidecar downloads with embedding support
Interactive first-run setup wizard with Ratatui TUI
Metadata backfill for previously archived videos
Duplicate detection and archive consolidation via dedupe command
Cookie refresh from browser profiles for authenticated downloads
Highly configurable filename tokens, container policies, and per-playlist overrides
